0:
Kupka Kupp has a matter of the heart on his mind.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Kupka Kupp has a matter of the heart on his mind.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
A distraught Kupka Kupp tells you of a young Elezen woman by the name of Aloyse, who has suddenly begged the moogle to rescind a letter she posted only moments ago. According to Kupka, tears were sparkling in her eyes as she fled the scene, and now, left only with a vague understanding of where she has gone, the postmoogle begs you and your friends' assistance in locating her. Astrid and Kupka Kupp are to search Greatloam Growery, while you and Pukty Piko are to head to Nophica's Altar.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
